package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for middleware_allocates_db_or_gorm_handle_per_request: Database or GORM connections opened inside handlers or middleware instead of process-level setup.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule324NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule324NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule324NegativeRecord) (Rule324NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario324Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule324NegativeService, input Rule324NegativeRecord) (Rule324NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule324NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
